description: No model: field in frontmatter across all 24 agents. Claude Code defaults to the ambient context model rather than the appropriate tier for each agent's complexity. Representative file shown; penalty applies to every agent file.
suggested_fix: Add model: haiku to mechanical agents (codebase-analyzer, scope-discoverer, task-decomposer, design-sync, quality-fixer, quality-fixer-frontend) and model: sonnet to reasoning-heavy agents (technical-designer, work-planner, prd-creator, verifier, investigator, requirement-analyzer).

description: Zero example blocks across 22 of 24 agents. No worked invocation scenarios exist to verify correct usage or ground expected input/output shapes. design-sync.md and acceptance-test-generator.md are the only agents with examples. Representative file shown; penalty applies to all 22 affected agents.
suggested_fix: Add an ## Examples section to each agent with at least one concrete input scenario and expected output. Priority: technical-designer, work-planner, prd-creator (highest complexity and most to gain).

description: "appropriate" appears 10+ times throughout the file ("appropriate abstractions", "appropriate level of detail", "appropriate design patterns", etc.) alongside other vague terms (comprehensive, sufficient, proper). No measurable thresholds provided. Cap of -20 reached.
suggested_fix: Replace unconstrained uses with measurable criteria, e.g. "describe tradeoffs between at least two design alternatives" instead of "use appropriate design patterns", and "document all public interfaces and data contracts" instead of "appropriate documentation".

description: Same vague-quantifier density as technical-designer.md: "appropriate" used 10+ times with no measurable thresholds. Also inherits the checklist/process mismatch (Standards identification gate in checklist but not described in process). Cap of -20 reached.
suggested_fix: Port the Standards Identification Gate process description from technical-designer.md into this file's Mandatory Process section, and replace vague terms with measurable criteria matching the backend variant.

description: 5 vague quantifiers in a single file: relevant×2, appropriate×3 — used without measurable criteria (e.g. "relevant components", "appropriate granularity").
suggested_fix: Replace with scoped specifics: e.g. "components that call or are called by the target function" instead of "relevant components", "one entry per file touched" instead of "appropriate granularity".

description: 3 vague quantifiers per file — pattern is representative of 17 agents scoring 74–78 (solver, task-executor, scope-discoverer, task-decomposer, investigator, security-reviewer, rule-advisor, quality-fixer, task-executor-frontend, verifier, quality-fixer-frontend, code-reviewer, code-verifier, requirement-analyzer, document-reviewer, integration-test-reviewer, and others) that each contain 1–4 instances of "appropriate", "relevant", "comprehensive", or "sufficient" without thresholds. Representative file shown.
suggested_fix: Audit each agent for unconstrained adjectives and replace with scoped, measurable criteria. One-line fix per instance; total effort roughly 30–60 minutes across all 17 files.

description: The skill dispatches work to dev-workflows-frontend:task-decomposer but no frontend-namespaced task-decomposer agent exists in agents/. Only agents/task-decomposer.md exists without a -frontend suffix. If the plugin manifest follows the directory structure, this routing call will fail.
suggested_fix: Either create agents/task-decomposer-frontend.md as a frontend-specific task decomposer, or update recipe-front-build/SKILL.md to route to the existing dev-workflows:task-decomposer.

description: The verification checklist includes "Standards identification gate completed (required)" as a mandatory step, but the Mandatory Process section never describes the gate. The parent technical-designer.md describes it in full. The frontend variant inherited the checklist item without porting the process, leaving callers with an undocumented required step.
suggested_fix: Copy the Standards Identification Gate process block from technical-designer.md into technical-designer-frontend.md's Mandatory Process section, adjusting any backend-specific references to their frontend equivalents.

description: The agent's process description references TaskCreate as part of its workflow but the frontmatter tools: list does not include it. At runtime Claude Code may refuse the call or prompt an unexpected permission grant.
suggested_fix: Add TaskCreate to the tools: list in agents/requirement-analyzer.md frontmatter, or if TaskCreate is only conditionally used, document the condition explicitly and confirm it is covered by the declared tool set.
